title: holosteum klopotovii
side_effects: Holosteum klopotovii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and interactions with medications. Ingesting large amounts can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while topical application may cause skin irritation and rashes. Improper use can also increase the risk of anaphylaxis, a severe and potentially life-threatening allergic reaction. Furthermore, combining Holosteum klopotovii with certain medications, such as blood thinners or diabetes medications, may exacerbate underlying health conditions.
